vibe: Peaceful, wise, grounded, immersive, cinematic, spiritual calm

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous spacing. e.g., py-24, py-32 for sections. gap-12 or gap-16 for main grids.
layout_and_spacing.bento_grid: For the gallery: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8. Mix tall (col-span-4 row-span-2) and wide (col-span-8 row-span-1) shapes.
layout_and_spacing.surface_strategy: Cards should use flat background (#F5F5F0 or #E5DFD3) with 1px border (#D5CFC3) instead of heavy shadows. Let the photography stand out.
layout_and_spacing.header: Crystal Glass style: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-white/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/20

components.marketing_layout: Raw HTML/Tailwind for asymmetrical sections and grids. DO NOT use Shadcn cards for the main page layout.
components.chatbot_widget: Use Shadcn 'Tabs' for switching between Chat and Voice mode. Use Shadcn 'ScrollArea' for the chat history. Use Shadcn 'Input' and 'Button' for the message bar. The widget container itself should use the surface_glass strategy (backdrop-blur-xl).
components.animations: Framer Motion for page scroll-reveals (staggered fade up). Pulse animation around the monk avatar when in 'Voice Mode' to simulate active listening/speaking.

hero_background.description: Wide-angle photograph of a serene minimalist Sikkim monastery at golden hour. Use as the main hero visual.

monk_avatar.description: Minimalist portrait silhouette of a Buddhist monk in deep maroon robes. Use as Tenzin's avatar in the Chatbot Voice Mode.

gallery_meditation_details.description: Close-up photography of weathered terracotta meditation bowls and burning incense.

gallery_landscape_1.description: Mountains, clouds, and a small temple in Sikkim.

gallery_landscape_2.description: A village nestled against a mountain range in Sikkim.

about_prayer_flags.description: Colorful Buddhist prayer flags flying in the air.
about_prayer_flags.usage: About Sikkim Section (overlapping with text content)

header.content: Minimal brand mark 'Sikkim Monastery'. Links: 'Discover', 'Galleries', 'Travel Guides'. A CTA 'Speak to Tenzin'.

hero.layout: 50/50 split or overlapping block. Left: Typography 'Awaken Your Inner Pilgrim', soft body text about finding peace in Sikkim's ancient monasteries. Right: 'hero_background' image with rounded edges, subtle drop shadow.
hero.instructions: Do NOT use a full-screen dark overlay. Let the image breathe against the #F5F5F0 background. Add an elegant CTA button using the accent color #8B3A2B.

about_sikkim.layout: Asymmetrical layout. Large serif quote: 'Journey within for spiritual travel deeper into your soul'. Image of prayer flags overlapping the section.
about_sikkim.instructions: Use organic spacing and varying font sizes.

monastery_gallery.layout: Bento Grid (Mode A). Showcase the three gallery images with subtle text overlays on hover.
monastery_gallery.instructions: Use framer-motion to reveal these items on scroll.

travel_tips.content: Permit information, Altitude sickness preparation, Monastery etiquette.

floating_chatbot_widget.layout: Fixed bottom-right corner. 400px width. Glassmorphism styling.
floating_chatbot_widget.content:
Header: 'Tenzin - Monk Guide'. Tabs: 'Chat', 'Voice'. 
- Chat Tab: Typical conversational UI. Bubble colors: User uses accent_secondary, AI uses plain background.
- Voice Tab: Show the 'monk_avatar' image centered. Add an animated pulsing ring behind it. Add a 'Start Speaking' microphone button.
floating_chatbot_widget.instructions: Ensure data-testid attributes are present on all inputs, tabs, and buttons.

testing.requirements: All interactive elements, inputs, and major blocks MUST include data-testid. E.g., data-testid='chatbot-trigger', data-testid='chat-tab', data-testid='voice-tab', data-testid='chat-input'.
